## Summary

Fixes the #1 product weakness: the dashboard showed "‚Äî" for all scores because it read non-existent field paths from evaluation artifacts. Also fixes Agent Readiness always showing "Not Started" and suppresses superseded failed evaluations from cluttering the history table.

## Scope

- `lib/dashboard/getDashboardEvaluations.ts` ‚Äî score extraction fix, failure filtering
- `lib/dashboard/getDashboardAnalytics.ts` ‚Äî score + criteria field path fix
- `app/agent-readiness/page.tsx` ‚Äî live package status from `agent_readiness_sections` table

Out of scope: UI/component changes, evaluation pipeline, report rendering.

## Tests Updated

Existing `EvaluationHistoryTable.test.jsx` continues to pass. No new tests needed ‚Äî this is a data-path correction (wrong field names ‚Üí correct field names).

## Visual Evidence

N/A ‚Äî no visual changes to components; the fix is in server-side data fetching. Dashboard will now show actual scores (e.g., "8" instead of "‚Äî") for completed evaluations.

N/A ‚Äî no UI changes.

N/A ‚Äî server-side only.

N/A ‚Äî no CI/infra changes.

Dashboard page, Agent Readiness workspace page, Dashboard Analytics charts.

## Schema Diff

N/A ‚Äî no schema changes. Reads from existing `evaluation_artifacts` and `agent_readiness_sections` tables.

## Data Backfill

N/A ‚Äî no backfill needed. Existing artifacts already contain the correct data at the correct paths; the code was simply reading the wrong fields.

## Input ‚Üí Action ‚Üí Output

- Input: User visits `/dashboard` or `/agent-readiness`
- Action: Server fetches `evaluation_artifacts` content, reads `overview.overall_score_0_100`
- Output: Actual scores (0-10 scale) displayed in KPI cards, history table, progress bars, charts
